reason: Tested agent's ability to use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access permissions.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Located and clicked the "QA-20260415-211447-psz2" agent in sidebar — Agent opened, status showed "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" which is acceptable per requirements
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message entered and sent successfully, new session created
Waited for GitHub access request card — Card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to check your username and identity?" with GitHub account checkbox already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Permission granted, agent resumed processing
Granted API permission when "Allow Once" dialog appeared for "Get the authenticated user" request — Permission allowed, agent continued
Waited for agent response (46 seconds total) — Agent completed successfully and returned response
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." ✓
Captured final screenshot showing complete conversation and response — Screenshot saved as step-3-final-response.png
